chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP. No. S-1376 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA NO. 505/2026( If granted) 2. For orders on office objections No. 1 to 3 a/w reply of counsel thereof as “Flag-A)” 3. For orders on CMA No. 8760/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. Date of hearing and Order: 26.01.2026 None present for the petitioner --------------- This was the position of previous date of hearing i.e. 09.12.2025. prima facie, the petitioner has lost interest in the matter to pursue the case vigilantly, therefore this petition is dismissed in default. JUDGE Shafi
